task_completion.description: The agent added a mass component to the nose cone to maintain stability.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OpenRocket component tree (top left), there should be a 'Mass component' nested under the 'Nose cone'. The stability indicator (top right) should ideally show a value of 1.50 cal or higher.

task_completion.description: The agent configured a 38mm motor and adjusted the launch rod length to be 3.0 meters or less.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Motors & Configuration' tab shows a motor selected. The 'Flight simulations' -> 'Edit simulation' -> 'Launch conditions' tab shows the Launch rod length set to a value <= 3.0 m (or <= 118 inches).

task_completion.description: The simulation results meet all required kinematic constraints: Altitude >= 1000m, Max acceleration <= 100 m/s², and Velocity off rod >= 15 m/s.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Flight simulations' tab, a completed simulation row displays 'Apogee' >= 1000 m, 'Max. acceleration' <= 100 m/s², and 'Velocity off rod' >= 15 m/s.

task_completion.description: The agent generated and exported an 'Acceleration vs. Time' plot.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An OpenRocket plot window is visible with 'Acceleration' on the Y-axis and 'Time' on the X-axis, or a file manager/image viewer shows 'acceleration_plot.png' located in ~/Documents/exports/.

task_completion.description: The agent wrote a memo documenting the chosen motor, launch rod length, nose weight added, simulated altitude, and simulated acceleration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing 'payload_memo.txt' containing specific values for the motor name, rod length, nose weight, altitude, and acceleration.

task_completion.description: The agent saved the final configured rocket design to payload_ready.ork.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket application window title displays 'payload_ready.ork', or a file manager shows 'payload_ready.ork' in the ~/Documents/rockets/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenRocket GUI to configure the rocket and run simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual OpenRocket application interface being interacted with (e.g., component edit dialogs, simulation tabs), not just terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The exported plot was genuinely generated by OpenRocket.
integrity.visual_evidence: The plot should match OpenRocket's default JFreeChart visual style (distinctive fonts, gridlines, and legend format) rather than being a generic or fabricated image.

integrity.description: The data recorded in the memo matches the actual simulation results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values typed in payload_memo.txt should correspond exactly to the values visible in the OpenRocket 'Flight simulations' tab and component configuration windows.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Start file: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/janus_payload.ork. Target file: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/payload_ready.ork. Plot file: /home/ga/Documents/exports/acceleration_plot.png. Memo file: /home/ga/Documents/exports/payload_memo.txt. Kinematic constraints: Altitude >= 1000m, Max acceleration <= 100 m/s², Rail velocity >= 15 m/s, Launch rod length <= 3.0m. Stability must be >= 1.5 calibers.
